channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Python nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐍 whyzhow/Kaggle-NeurIPS---Open-Polymer-Prediction-2025-Silver-Algorithm-Overview (804 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: whyzhow

📝 Repository: whyzhow/Kaggle-NeurIPS---Open-Polymer-Prediction-2025-Silver-Algorithm-Overview

📄 Descrizione: Filter the R-group and suspicious patterns in the polymer notation, use RDKit for parsability verification and unified conversion on this basis, add multi-source external data, grouping and mean aggregation with cS as the key to de-weight, multi-view GNN, CatBoost, XGboost modelling, using linear weighting for model fusion

⭐ Stelle: 804

🍴 Forks: 23

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: ffv gnn kaggle python xgboost

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-13T12:11:32Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-28T03:43:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐍 OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS (747 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenMOSS

📝 Repository: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS

📄 Descrizione: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.

⭐ Stelle: 747

🍴 Forks: 70

💻 Linguaggio: Python
